headline: Google expands Gemini AI capabilities as medicine market reaches 3.36 trillion
body: Google is rolling out Skills for Gemini and expanding AI Studio access while opening Personal Intelligence AI to all US users, signaling aggressive expansion of its AI infrastructure. The $3.36 trillion AI in medicine market forecasted through 2040 includes major players like Google DeepMind, IBM Watson Health, and Tempus competing for clinical AI dominance. For healthcare organizations, this means Google is positioning Gemini as a viable alternative to specialized clinical AI platforms for workflow automation and documentation tasks. The broader implication: expect increased pressure on existing healthcare AI vendors to differentiate beyond generic language models, and anticipate hospitals re-evaluating build-versus-buy strategies for internal AI tools. Healthcare CIOs and IT leaders should monitor Google's healthcare-specific Gemini features closely as they mature, particularly around EHR integration and compliance certifications.
